1_en54_system_overview.principle: Voice alarm system automatically broadcasts evacuation messages on fire alarm activation

2_zone_design.principle: PAVA zones must align with fire alarm zones and evacuation phasing
rules: Each fire alarm zone = 1 or more PAVA speaker zones
Adjacent zones must be independently addressable for phased evacuation
PAVA8500: 8 base zones, expandable by 8 per PAVA8500E (max 64)
Each zone requires dedicated amplifier channel with standby redundancy

3_speaker_selection_en54.principle: Only EN54-24 certified speakers may be used in voice evacuation zones
3_speaker_selection_en54.spl_requirement: Minimum 65dBA or 6dB above ambient noise at any occupied point

4_amplifier_redundancy.principle: Standby amplifier must be available to replace any failed zone amplifier
4_amplifier_redundancy.requirement: N+1 redundancy: for every N amplifier channels, 1 standby channel must be available. PAVA8500 supports automatic failover.

5_battery_backup.principle: PAVA must operate for minimum 24 hours standby + 30 minutes full alarm on battery
5_battery_backup.sizing: Battery capacity (Ah) = (standby_current_A × 24) + (alarm_current_A × 0.5). Use sealed lead-acid batteries rated for fire alarm duty.

6_cable_requirements.principle: Speaker cables must survive fire for minimum 2 hours

specifications.monitoring: Speaker line monitoring for open/short circuit fault detection

7_fire_panel_interface.principle: PAVA controller receives zone trigger signals from fire alarm panel
7_fire_panel_interface.operation: Fire panel activates zone → PAVA plays pre-recorded evacuation message → live mic override available for fire controller

8_message_management.principle: Pre-recorded messages must be intelligible and tested
requirements: Alert tone (minimum 3 seconds) before spoken message
Message must be clear, calm, and directive
Multiple messages for different scenarios (fire, bomb, general evacuation)
Regular testing schedule (weekly silent test, monthly audible test)

9_commissioning_and_testing.principle: System must be commissioned by competent person with documented results
tests: Fault monitoring test (open circuit, short circuit, earth fault)

standards.scope: Voice alarm control and indicating equipment
Voice alarm systems — design, installation, commissioning
